items.name: test-driven-development
items.title: Test Driven Development
items.description: Implement a feature or bugfix test-first using the red-green-refactor cycle — write a failing test, watch it fail, write the minimal code to pass, then clean up. Works in any language or test runner. Use when building new behaviour or fixing a bug and you want the test to actually prove the code works.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
